description.Title: Easily Install and Load the 'Tidyverse'
description.Description: The 'tidyverse' is a set of packages that work in harmony because they share common data representations and 'API' design. This package is designed to make it easy to install and load multiple 'tidyverse' packages in a single step.

description.Title: Tidy Messy Data
description.Description: Tools to help to create tidy data, where each column is a variable, each row is an observation, and each cell contains a single value. 'tidyr' contains tools for reshaping data.

description.Title: A Wrapper of the JavaScript Library 'DataTables'
description.Description: Data objects in R can be rendered as HTML tables using the JavaScript library 'DataTables' (typically via R Markdown or Shiny). The 'DataTables' library has been included in this R package.

description.Title: Scale Functions for Visualization
description.Description: Graphical scales map data to aesthetics, and provide methods for automatically determining breaks and labels for axes and legends.

description.Title: Web Application Framework for R
description.Description: Makes it incredibly easy to build interactive web applications with R. Automatic reactive binding between inputs and outputs and extensive pre-built widgets make it possible to build beautiful, responsive, and powerful applications with minimal effort.

description.Title: Create Dashboards with 'Shiny'
description.Description: Create dashboards with 'Shiny'. This package provides a dashboard layout and a set of functions for creating dashboard components.

description.Title: Create Interactive Web Graphics via 'plotly.js'
description.Description: Create interactive web graphics from 'ggplot2' graphs and/or a custom interface to the JavaScript library 'plotly.js' inspired by the grammar of graphics.

description.Title: A Grammar of Data Manipulation
description.Description: A fast, consistent tool for working with data frame like objects, both in memory and out of memory.

description.Title: Create Elegant Data Visualisations Using the Grammar of Graphics
description.Description: A system for declaratively creating graphics, based on The Grammar of Graphics.
